description: StubHub is an online ticket marketplace for live events. Its developer offering lets applications search event catalog data and manage seller listings, sales, account data, and webhook subscriptions.
summary: StubHub exposes one OAuth2-protected REST API on api.stubhub.net (with sandbox on sandbox.api.stubhub.net) covering catalog, account, inventory, sales, and webhook-management endpoints; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
